citations.desc: Access and inspection of records and property; submission of itineraries.
citations.narrative:
A responsible adult was not available to accompany APHIS Officials during the inspection process at 9:35am on
3/10/2026. The inspector attempted to contact the licensee/registrant by knocking on the door, calling the number on file,
leaving a voice message and texting, honking the horn and waiting 30 minutes.
Left the property, returned about 20 minutes later, knocked on the door and left a "Leave Behind Flyer" on the door.
After leaving the property, the licensee texted stating he was not available for an inspection.
Additional Inspectors:
William Janecke, VETERINARY MEDICAL OFFICEREnd Section

narrative:
2.126(b) 
   
Access and inspection of records and property; submission of itineraries.

leaving a voice message and texting, honking the horn and waiting 30 minutes.  
Left the property, returned about 20 minutes later, knocked on the door and left a "Leave Behind Flyer" on the door.
